© Copyright 2026 Perplexity"},{"url":"https://karozieminski.substack.com/p/perplexity-computer-use-cases-5-workflows-may-2026","title":"Perplexity Computer Use Cases: 5 Workflows, Pricing, and the May 4 GPT-5.5 Switch (May 2026)","content":"TL;DR Perplexity Computer launched February 25, 2026, as a cloud-based orchestration system that routes work across 19 frontier AI models.
This guide lists a set of updates that change almost every serious use case, 5 workflows I run every week with credit cost, time saved, and the model behind each, plus the three signals that decide when Computer wins against Claude Code, OpenClaw, Manus, Make, and n8n.
This is the sixth post on Perplexity Computer for Product with Attitude.
Since April 2026, we’ve been handed something operationally convenient and intellectually inconvenient: complex tasks, neatly wrapped in pre-built workflows that can be activated without users writing prompts or building advanced context pipelines.
Perplexity Computer is a cloud-based AI agent that orchestrates 19+ frontier models (including Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro 3.1) to research, build, automate, and deploy from a single prompt.
Join 18K readers and learn with us.
Personal Computer, rolled out April 16, brings the orchestration to a local Mac."},{"url":"https://www.indiatoday.in/jobs/story/from-claude-cowork-to-perplexity-computer-2026-shows-ai-is-coming-for-these-jobs-tchc-2880898-2026-03-12","title":"From Claude Cowork to Perplexity Computer, 2026 shows AI is coming for these jobs - India Today","content":"From Claude Cowork to Perplexity Computer, 2026 shows AI is coming for these jobs

OpenAI has its Codex, which specialises in Coding, and Operator.
Then the latest one is called Computer from Perplexity, which is quite similar to OpenClaw.
And so do other AI agents — be it Perplexity Computer, Microsoft Copilot, Manus AI, OpenAI Operator and others.
But now AI agents such as Claude Cowork can already analyse lengthy documents, extract key clauses, organise files and produce summaries in minutes.
Systems like Claude Cowork can work directly with datasets and spreadsheets and can automate routine financial analysis typically carried out by entry-level analysts."},{"url":"https://www.shakudo.io/news/enterprise-ai-news","title":"Enterprise AI News | Latest AI Updates Daily | Shakudo News","content":"News is updated on a daily basis on a 30 day rolling window.
Anthropic has officially launched Claude Sonnet 5, introducing advanced agentic capabilities under the code name "Mythos" and "Fable." By deploying this model ahead of expected competitor timelines, Anthropic aggressively disrupts the frontier AI landscape.
This release directly challenges established vision models by achieving a 72% win rate in blind tests and a leading 85.20 score on the OlmOCRBench leaderboard.
By treating distinct specialized models as a single API call, Fugu tackles complex coding and cybersecurity tasks while bypassing vendor lock-in."}]}

Teach Perplexity Computer how to handle any task once, and it remembers forever. Create a custom skill for any task performed repeatedly, and Computer will follow it every time without re-explaining. * **Standardize recurring reports:** *\"Create a skill that generates a weekly performance summary with KPIs in a table, key wins as bullet points, and a 3-sentence outlook — formatted for Slack.\"*. * **Enforce a personal writing style:** *\"Create a skill for drafting LinkedIn posts in my voice: concise, no jargon, always end with a question to drive engagement.\"*. ## Model Council in Computer. Model Council automatically runs GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, and Gemini 3.1 Pro in parallel, then synthesizes where they agree, disagree, and what each uniquely contributes.
